title: Would A Manga Version of 30 Q Work
display_title: Would A Manga Version of 30 Q Work
wikitext:
[]: Would A Manga Version of 3.0/Q Work?             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Jan 21, 2015 10:50 am Maybe I'm a bit weird for being one of those people who likes viewing all the different takes different creators have for a franchise. But I'd really like to see Sadamoto or someone similar take a swing at making the manga adaptation of 3.0. I haven't really seen anyone either official or unofficial really take a swing at adapting the film into a Manga. What do you guys think, would a Manga adaptation of Q work?

[]:             Quote Post by TMBounty_Hunter » Wed Jan 21, 2015 11:03 am Only Tony Takezaki should be allowed to do it.

[]:             Quote Post by Monk Ed » Wed Jan 21, 2015 11:36 am TMBounty_Hunter wrote: Only Tony Takezaki should be allowed to do it.

[]:             Quote Post by Ornette » Wed Jan 21, 2015 11:55 am Monk Ed wrote: *googles* Gundam? Did he pen a really well-received new take?

[]:             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Jan 21, 2015 11:58 am I dunno, I feel he could pull it off.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Wed Jan 21, 2015 1:40 pm Well, there were rumors years ago (no idea where they originated from) that Sadamoto was going work on an NTE-take manga once he was done with NGE. Think it was just a rumor though, since he's back to his original manga stories: https://forum.evageeks.org/post/770033/Looking-for-other-YS-mangas-Koto-no-Oni-and-Archaic-Smile/#770033 And I wouldn't mind an NTE (not just Q) parody book by Takezaki either.

[]: Would A Manga Version of 3.0/Q Work?             Quote Post by Ray » Wed Jan 21, 2015 10:50 am Maybe I'm a bit weird for being one of those people who likes viewing all the different takes different creators have for a franchise. But I'd really like to see Sadamoto or someone similar take a swing at making the manga adaptation of 3.0. I haven't really seen anyone either official or unofficial really take a swing at adapting the film into a Manga. What do you guys think, would a Manga adaptation of Q work?
